task.title: Wire gateway policies to audit and content-proof evidence
task.summary: Strengthen validation gateway profiles so required audits, graph context, fresh isolation, and content proof are enforced by build kind and change class.

goal.outcome: Gateways block when required audit evidence, graph context, fresh isolation, or content-proof refs are missing for sensitive boundaries.
acceptance: Validation profiles declare required audit profiles by feedback/documentation/planning/implementation/task-close/publication contexts.
Implementation, task-close, publication, publish, and release validation require fresh context plus checked SHA/tree/digest evidence according to policy.
Validation reports distinguish attestation fields from content-proof refs.
Tests prove missing audit/content-proof evidence blocks and valid evidence passes.
non_goals: Do not implement remote push/release automation.
Do not replace deterministic tests with non-deterministic validation.

loop_start.reason: Compiler loops start from source refs and build handoffs, not prior loop chat memory.
evidence: new session id or recorded context reset

validation.reason: Implementation validation must not reuse builder thought context.

next_loop.reason: The next gateway must independently validate implementation evidence.

requirements.text: Implementation validation must block if source implementation build is not commit-ready.
Task-close validates actual immutable commit proof after implementation validation, not dirty pre-commit proof.

evidence_mapping.criterion: Bad implementation build cannot pass implementation gateway.
evidence_mapping.evidence: tests/smoke/loop-isolation-policy.test.mjs removes `CodeWiki-Validation` trailer and expects implementation validation block with `commit_readiness`.

evidence_mapping.criterion: Generated implementation builds include recovery commit trailers.
evidence_mapping.evidence: tests/smoke/builds.test.mjs asserts generated commit trailers include CodeWiki-Build, CodeWiki-Checks, CodeWiki-Validation, and CodeWiki-Recover.

summary: TASK-080 implementation gateway now enforces commit-readiness before pass validation.

source: user clarification: implementation gateway validates commit-readiness; task-close validates actual commit proof

evidence: tests/smoke/loop-isolation-policy.test.mjs creates a bad implementation build missing `CodeWiki-Validation` trailer and asserts implementation validation blocks with `commit_readiness`.
tests/smoke/builds.test.mjs asserts generated implementation builds include CodeWiki checks/validation/recover trailers and that dirty task-close/publication validations block.
tester.boundary: derive tests or test-design evidence before code changes where practical

evidence: src/application/builds.ts adds implementation commit-readiness validation and commit trailers.
src/adapters/pi/index.ts updates tool guidance for implementation vs task-close/publication proof.
System docs updated to define commit-readiness vs commit-proof boundaries.
notes: This fixes the missed rule: implementation gateway validates commit readiness; task-close validates actual commit proof after per-task commit exists.
builder.boundary: change code until tests, roadmap acceptance, and required checks pass

test_design_evidence: tests/smoke/loop-isolation-policy.test.mjs creates a bad implementation build missing `CodeWiki-Validation` trailer and asserts implementation validation blocks with `commit_readiness`.
tests/smoke/builds.test.mjs asserts generated implementation builds include CodeWiki checks/validation/recover trailers and that dirty task-close/publication validations block.
code_change_evidence: src/application/builds.ts adds implementation commit-readiness validation and commit trailers.
src/adapters/pi/index.ts updates tool guidance for implementation vs task-close/publication proof.
System docs updated to define commit-readiness vs commit-proof boundaries.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: Implementation gateway validates build commit-readiness instead of just tests/isolation.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: `writeValidationReport` now blocks implementation pass when source implementation build lacks task/build/checks/validation/recover commit trailers or other commit-ready fields.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: Implementation build contains commit body/trailers needed for per-task recovery commit.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: `publicationDefaults` now emits CodeWiki-Task, CodeWiki-Build, CodeWiki-Checks, CodeWiki-Validation, CodeWiki-Recover, archive, digest, and restore trailers.

acceptance_mapping.criterion: Task-close remains actual immutable commit-proof boundary.
acceptance_mapping.evidence: Task-close profile remains `fresh-context-clean-immutable-content`; tests assert dirty working-tree digest blocks task-close.

closure_brief.user_intent: Fix the gateway so implementation validation checks that the build contains everything needed for a per-task recovery commit, while task-close checks actual commit proof.
implemented_changes: Added implementation commit-readiness validation to validation writer.
Added CodeWiki checks/validation/recover trailers to implementation build publication payloads.
Added tests for missing commit-readiness blocking implementation validation.
Clarified docs: implementation gateway validates commit-readiness; task-close validates actual immutable commit proof.

validation: pending fresh validation after reload or direct source validation

non_goals_preserved: Did not require commit existence at implementation validation boundary.
Did not weaken task-close or publication proof requirements.
remaining_risks: Per-task commit slicing still required before task-close.

risks: Current repo has many historical uncommitted changes, so per-task commits still need careful slicing before task-close.
Running Pi process may need reload before tool implementation itself includes new commit-readiness logic.

handoff.fallback: Use codewiki_state refresh=true and this implementation_build; do not rely on chat transcript memory.

commit.title: chore(codewiki): record TASK-080 Wire gateway policies to audit and content-proof evidence implementation evidence
commit.body:
TASK-080 implementation gateway now enforces commit-readiness before pass validation.

Checks: npm run typecheck, node tests/smoke/loop-isolation-policy.test.mjs, node tests/smoke/builds.test.mjs, npm run test:features, npm run test:smoke, npm run check:architecture, npm test
Validation: .codewiki/validation/2026-05-15-implementation-pass-task-080.json
Remote publication requires explicit approval; this build is recommendation-only.
